prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn't bigger than your ability—it’s just been growing in your mind because you’ve been avoiding it. The hardest part is starting, not doing. Take a deep breath, set a timer for just 10 minutes, and dive in. Momentum builds once you move. Remember: you’ve handled tough things before, and this is no different. Do it scared, do it unsure—but *do it*. Future you will thank present you for showing up. Now go—start now, finish strong. 💪
